title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
synopsis: Set after the events of Transformers: Prime, Bumblebee is summoned back to Earth by a vision of Optimus Prime when the Decepticon prison ship Alchemor crash-lands on the planet. Leading a ragtag team of Autobots including a rebellious Sideswipe, a by-the-book cadet Strongarm, and a reformed Dinobot Grimlock, Bumblebee must recapture the escaped Decepticon fugitives while learning what it means to be a true leader.

episodes.title: Pilot (Part 1)
episodes.synopsis: A vision of Optimus Prime leads Bumblebee back to Earth, where the prison ship Alchemor has crashed, releasing Decepticon prisoners.

episodes.title: Pilot (Part 2)
episodes.synopsis: Bumblebee assembles an unlikely team to recapture the fugitive Underbite before he devours an entire city.

episodes.title: Trust Exercises
episodes.synopsis: The team struggles with trust issues while pursuing a Decepticon fugitive.

episodes.title: More than Meets the Eye
episodes.synopsis: Bumblebee's team discovers that some fugitives are more dangerous than they appear.

episodes.title: W.W.O.D.?
episodes.synopsis: Bumblebee asks himself 'What Would Optimus Do?' as he faces a leadership challenge.

episodes.title: As the Kospego Commands!
episodes.synopsis: Thunderhoof attempts to build a criminal empire on Earth using his Decepticon powers.

episodes.title: Collect 'Em All
episodes.synopsis: A Decepticon collector captures Transformers and other creatures as living trophies.

episodes.title: True Colors
episodes.synopsis: The team faces a chameleon-like Decepticon that can disguise itself as anything.

episodes.title: Rumble in the Jungle
episodes.synopsis: A mission in a dense jungle pits the team against a powerful beast-mode Decepticon.

episodes.title: Can You Dig It?
episodes.synopsis: An underground Decepticon threatens to cause sinkholes across the region.

episodes.title: Adventures in Bumblebee-Sitting!
episodes.synopsis: Bumblebee is incapacitated and the team must operate without their leader.

episodes.title: Hunting Season
episodes.synopsis: Bounty hunter Drift arrives on Earth pursuing Decepticon fugitives with his own methods.

episodes.title: Out of Focus
episodes.synopsis: A Decepticon with hypnotic powers puts the team in a trance.

episodes.title: Sideways
episodes.synopsis: A Decepticon with dimensional-shifting abilities proves nearly impossible to catch.

episodes.title: Even Robots Have Nightmares
episodes.synopsis: A fear-inducing Decepticon traps the team in their worst nightmares.

episodes.title: Some Body, Any Body
episodes.synopsis: A body-swapping incident shuffles the team's minds into each other's bodies.

episodes.title: One of Our Mini-Cons Is Missing
episodes.synopsis: Fixit goes missing and the team must track down their Mini-Con companion.

episodes.title: Deep Trouble
episodes.synopsis: An underwater Decepticon threatens a coastal community from the ocean depths.

episodes.title: The Champ
episodes.synopsis: Grimlock enters a fighting competition that turns out to be a Decepticon trap.

episodes.title: The Trouble with Fixit
episodes.synopsis: Fixit's glitches worsen and the team must fix him before he causes a catastrophe.

episodes.title: Lockout
episodes.synopsis: The team is locked out of their own base and must find a way back in.

episodes.title: Similarly Different
episodes.synopsis: Two very different Decepticons team up, forcing the Autobots to find common ground.

episodes.title: The Buzz on Windblade
episodes.synopsis: The mysterious Autobot warrior Windblade arrives with urgent news from Cybertron.

episodes.title: Ghosts and Impostors
episodes.synopsis: A shapeshifting Decepticon impersonates team members, sowing distrust among the Autobots.

episodes.title: Battlegrounds, Part 1
episodes.synopsis: Megatronus the Fallen enacts his plan to destroy both Earth and Cybertron using the fugitives as pawns.

episodes.title: Battlegrounds, Part 2
episodes.synopsis: The Autobots make a final stand against Megatronus. Optimus Prime returns to help defeat the ancient threat.

episodes.title: Overloaded, Part 1
episodes.synopsis: Optimus Prime merges with his Decepticon Hunter to gain a powerful new form as a new threat emerges.

episodes.title: Overloaded, Part 2
episodes.synopsis: The team must stop the Decepticon Overload while Optimus masters his enhanced abilities.

episodes.title: Metal Meltdown
episodes.synopsis: A heat-generating Decepticon threatens to melt everything in its path.

episodes.title: Suspended
episodes.synopsis: Strongarm is temporarily suspended from duty and must prove herself worthy of the team.

episodes.title: Cover Me
episodes.synopsis: An undercover mission requires the team to adopt new disguises.

episodes.title: Brainpower
episodes.synopsis: A super-intelligent Decepticon outwits the team at every turn.

episodes.title: Misdirection
episodes.synopsis: A magician-themed Decepticon uses illusions to evade capture.

episodes.title: Bumblebee's Night Off
episodes.synopsis: Bumblebee tries to take a night off but gets pulled into an unexpected adventure.

episodes.title: Impounded
episodes.synopsis: The Autobots' vehicle modes are impounded, leaving them stranded in robot mode.

episodes.title: Portals
episodes.synopsis: Interdimensional portals open across the scrapyard, scattering the team across locations.

episodes.title: Graduation Exercises
episodes.synopsis: Strongarm faces a final test to graduate from cadet to full officer.

episodes.title: Decepticon Island (Part 1)
episodes.synopsis: The team discovers an island fortress where Steeljaw has assembled an army of Decepticon fugitives.

episodes.title: Decepticon Island (Part 2)
episodes.synopsis: The Autobots launch a massive assault on Decepticon Island to end Steeljaw's rebellion once and for all.

episodes.title: History Lessons
episodes.synopsis: The team learns about ancient Cybertronian history that connects to current events on Earth.

episodes.title: Strongarm's Big Score
episodes.synopsis: Strongarm takes the lead on a mission to prove her capabilities as a full-fledged officer.

episodes.title: Pretzel Logic
episodes.synopsis: A convoluted Decepticon plan twists the team in circles.

episodes.title: Mighty Big Trouble
episodes.synopsis: Starscream arrives on Earth seeking powerful Mini-Con weapons in the first part of a three-part arc.

episodes.title: Mini-Con Madness
episodes.synopsis: The hunt for weaponized Mini-Cons intensifies as Starscream powers up.

episodes.title: Worthy
episodes.synopsis: The team must prove themselves worthy to defeat the powered-up Starscream and save Earth.

episodes.title: King of the Hill (Part 1)
episodes.synopsis: A new Decepticon threat emerges as Steeljaw escapes captivity and forms a dangerous alliance.

episodes.title: King of the Hill (Part 2)
episodes.synopsis: The team battles to reclaim their territory from the resurgent Decepticon forces.

episodes.title: Defrosted
episodes.synopsis: A frozen Decepticon thaws out and wreaks havoc with ice-based powers.

episodes.title: Blurred
episodes.synopsis: A speed-based Decepticon challenges Bumblebee to the ultimate race.

episodes.title: Sphere of Influence
episodes.synopsis: A mysterious sphere grants a Decepticon incredible gravitational powers.

episodes.title: Bee Cool
episodes.synopsis: Bumblebee tries to play it cool while dealing with a particularly annoying Decepticon.

episodes.title: The Great Divide
episodes.synopsis: A rift within the team threatens to divide the Autobots at the worst possible time.

episodes.title: Get a Clue
episodes.synopsis: The team must solve a mystery to track down a cunning Decepticon fugitive.

episodes.title: Out of the Shadows
episodes.synopsis: Shadow Raker, a shadowy Decepticon, attacks from the darkness using stealth tactics.

episodes.title: Disordered Personalities
episodes.synopsis: The team's personalities are scrambled by a Decepticon device, causing chaos.

episodes.title: Guilty As Charged
episodes.synopsis: One of the team members is framed for a crime they did not commit.

episodes.title: The Golden Knight
episodes.synopsis: An ancient Cybertronian knight emerges with a connection to Earth's medieval past.

episodes.title: The Fastest Bot Alive!
episodes.synopsis: A race determines who truly is the fastest Transformer on Earth.

episodes.title: Railroad Rage
episodes.synopsis: A Decepticon takes control of a freight train, endangering passengers and cargo.

episodes.title: Combine and Conquer
episodes.synopsis: The Stunticons combine into Menasor, and the Autobots must find a way to form their own combiner.

episodes.title: Moon Breaker
episodes.synopsis: A Decepticon scheme threatens to destabilize the Moon's orbit around Earth.

episodes.title: Exiles
episodes.synopsis: Autobot exiles from Cybertron arrive with warnings of a greater threat approaching.

episodes.title: Breathing Room
episodes.synopsis: The team is trapped in an enclosed space with a dwindling air supply.

episodes.title: Prepare for Departure
episodes.synopsis: The team prepares for what may be a one-way trip as the final battle approaches.

episodes.title: Prisoner Principles
episodes.synopsis: The ethical treatment of Decepticon prisoners raises difficult questions for the team.

episodes.title: Collateral Damage
episodes.synopsis: The consequences of battle catch up with the team as collateral damage mounts.

episodes.title: Something He Ate
episodes.synopsis: Grimlock ingests something dangerous that gives him unpredictable new abilities.

episodes.title: Sick as a Bot
episodes.synopsis: A Cybertronian virus spreads through the team, weakening them before a critical mission.

episodes.title: Five Fugitives
episodes.synopsis: Five remaining Decepticon fugitives unite for a coordinated attack on the Autobots.

episodes.title: Enemy of My Enemy
episodes.synopsis: Cyclonus arrives as the ultimate threat, forcing unlikely alliances in the penultimate episode.

episodes.title: Freedom Fighters
episodes.synopsis: In the series finale, Bumblebee's team faces Cyclonus in a final battle to protect Earth and prove themselves as true Autobot heroes.

facts: The first 13 episodes were released dubbed in Mandarin Chinese on December 31, 2014, weeks before the US premiere, making China the first country to air the series.
Animation was produced by Polygon Pictures for 3D elements and GONZO and Drop for 2D elements.
The series was nominated for a 2016 Daytime Emmy Award for Outstanding Special Class Animated Program.
Robots in Disguise serves as a direct sequel to Transformers: Prime, set years after the Autobots restored Cybertron.
Season 2.5 is sometimes counted as a separate mini-series or TV event, making the episode count vary between sources.
The series features the return of several Prime characters including Optimus, Ratchet, Soundwave, and Starscream.
The series had an unusual international rollout, with episodes premiering in Australia, the UK, Canada, and other countries before the US in many cases.
11 additional short episodes were produced alongside the main series.
